calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants We Print Today, LCC or David J. Struski.
Defaults were entered against defendants on February 9, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 9, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on March 10, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants We Print Today, LLC and David J. Struski as follows:

Damages/Principal - $56,121.15.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,122.44.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $425.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $61,168.59.

It is further Ordered and Adjudged that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment listed in Paragraph 3 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
